title: leonotis glabrata
intro: Leonotis glabrata, commonly known as mountain leonotis or hairy lion's tail, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Leonotis glabrata include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Leonotis glabrata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
